title: VerificationResult
description: Result of a single quality gate evaluation for a patch unit. The only open-class contract in the domain catalog — additional properties are permitted at the root for forward-compatible gate-specific metadata (Contract Acceptance Matrix §5 'tolerant-read 후속 의무').
$comment: compat_class: open (root additionalProperties intentionally UNSET/true — this is the only domain contract without additionalProperties:false at the root; nested items ARE closed via $ref to common/error-detail, which is itself a closed schema). Authority: approved plan §2 domain row 5 (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2, §5); docs/architecture/contract-catalog.md P0 table 'VerificationResult' row (Owner quality-eval, Idempotency key 'run_id+patch_unit_id+gate_id', Retention 'audit retention (성공 선언 증거)'). Ruling R4 (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §1.1): 'quality.gate passed 에 failures 잔존 가능' resolved via BIDIRECTIONAL conditional below — failed MUST carry >=1 failures, passed MUST NOT carry a failures key at all. status enum deliberately excludes 'skipped' — Prompt package §8:404 'gate skip = release-reject'; a 'conditional_pass' value is likewise excluded — REVIEW-level P1 contract concept (k3s §4.3 REMEDIATION/HANDOFF_READY state machine), not a gate-level VerificationResult status in W1. gate_id is a free string, NOT an enum, because the canonical gate list lives in quality-gates.yaml (not yet authored in this unit) rather than being duplicated/frozen into this schema.

tenant_id.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 5 field list.

run_id.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 5 field list; contract-catalog.md idempotency key component.

patch_unit_id.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 5 field list; contract-catalog.md idempotency key component; corresponds to ChangePlan.patch_units[].id / PatchArtifact.patch_unit_id.

gate_id.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 5 field list; contract-catalog.md idempotency key component. Deliberately NOT an enum — the canonical gate list lives in quality-gates.yaml (Contract Acceptance Matrix / harness, not authored in this w1-07 unit).

status.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 5 field list. No 'skipped' value — gate skip is treated as a release-reject condition (Prompt package §8:404), never a recordable VerificationResult status. No 'conditional_pass' value — that is a REVIEW-level P1 (k3s §4.3 REMEDIATION state) contract concept, out of scope for a single gate's pass/fail result.

worktree_commit.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 5 field list — same 7-40 hex short-sha convention as PatchArtifact.worktree_commit (ADR-0013 appendix short-sha examples / ADR-0023 worktree execution conventions).

evaluated_at.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 5 field list.

failures.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 5 field list. Each item is the closed common/error-detail shape (error_code/retryable/summary only) — a 'stack_trace' or any other extra key on a failure item is rejected by error-detail's own additionalProperties:false, not by this file.

report_uri.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 5 field list — optional pointer to a full gate report artifact; uri_ref forbids query/fragment (R9-5).

allOf.$comment: Ruling R4 direction 1: status=failed MUST carry failures (>=1 item, enforced by the failures property's own minItems).

Ruling R4 direction 2 (the bidirectional half): status=passed MUST NOT carry a failures key at all — closes the gap where a gate could declare success while a failures array still lingers in the payload.
